why: Ensure edits maintain knowledge quality standards

output.console: Validation result for modified frontmatter and content fields

success_handling.criteria: Modified frontmatter conforms to schema and content meets quality standards (non-empty, structured)

error_handling.criteria: Modified frontmatter fields do not conform to schema (missing required fields, wrong types)
error_handling.action: Return validation errors listing the invalid fields, prompt user to correct

error_handling.criteria: Edits reduced content below minimum quality thresholds (too short, lost structure)
error_handling.action: Warn user that edits degraded content quality, allow proceeding if confirmed

event.message: Content quality decreased after edit for entry {entry_id}

decisions.outcome: Abort edit, return validation errors to user
Warn user, allow proceeding if confirmed
